personal.title: California Housing Price Prediction
personal.description: An end-to-end machine learning web application for predicting California housing prices using multiple regression models including Linear Regression, Random Forest, and XGBoost. Features interactive dashboards, real-time predictions, model evaluation metrics, and data visualization.

personal.title: TaskFlow Pro
personal.description: Advanced task management system with real-time updates, team collaboration features, and analytics dashboard.

personal.title: Weather Dashboard
personal.description: Interactive weather application with 7-day forecast, interactive maps, and weather alerts.
